title: Sign in
subtitle: Sign-in below
mfaCodeHelp: Use your authenticator app code or a backup code
mfaRequired: Enter your authentication code to finish signing in
sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
forceLocalLogin: Local login is enabled for this attempt. Use your username and password to sign in.
passwordResetSuccess: Your password was reset. Sign in with the new password.
passwordResetInvalidLink: That password reset link is invalid or expired
emailVerificationSent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox to continue.
adminApprovalRequired: Your account is waiting for administrator approval
verifyEmailInvalidLink: That email verification link is invalid or expired
invalidMfa: Authentication code is invalid or expired
tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.
genericError: Sign in failed. Please try again.
profileError: Sign in succeeded, but your profile could not be loaded. Please try again.
forgotPasswordHelp: If the account exists, a reset email will be sent
forgotPasswordEmailNotConfigured: Email is not configured on this server
ssoTokenExchangeFailed: Single sign-on completed, but token exchange failed
ssoAccountNotFound: No account is linked to this identity provider
noLoginMethods: No login methods are enabled on this server
